entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.085504. - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\GWAV_instance_2024_2025.xml
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0231.10924 - 11:28:04.331234 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\GWAV_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\GWAV_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\GWAV_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0231.10924] The calculation network 00000006 - Statement - Consolidated Statements of CashFlows has used the aggregate concept ProceedsFromIssuanceOfDebt. The calculation relationship also contains the other concept ProceedsFromOtherDebt. These two concepts should not appear together as siblings in the same calculation network.
Rule Element Id:10924 Rule version: 29.0.2 - GWAV_instance_2024_2025.xml 11501
